heading: Today
text: Clouds, limited sun. A few afternoon rain or snow showers Adirondacks and Rt. 2 north.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Localized evening snow or rain showers north. Partial clearing.

heading: Friday
text: Early sun.  Afternoon snow or rain showers developing.
temperature: upper 30s to low 40s north, 40s to 50 south
